tensor_core.generation: 4th Gen Tensor Core with Transformer Engine
tensor_core.description: Hopper Tensor Core with FP8, BF16, TF32, and FP16 precision modes; dynamic range adaptation for transformers.

bottleneck_analysis.bottleneck: FP8 precision scaling and conversion overhead in Transformer Engine.
bottleneck_analysis.description: While FP8 Tensor Cores offer huge speedups, dynamic quantization/dequantization and scaling metadata handling add overhead. Tile misalignment with 16×16 FP8 dimensions can further reduce tensor utilization.
bottleneck_analysis.workload_characteristic: Mixed-precision transformer blocks using FP8 for training or inference with dynamic range adaptation across long sequences.
